title: BEM-847 execute 846 next
objective:
Run script:
"""
sep='\n'
for d in ['governance/state','governance/reports','governance/tasks/pending','governance/handoff','governance/transport','governance/protocols','governance/workflow_dispatch_queue','governance/audit_mailbox/gpt_to_claude']:
    Path(d).mkdir(parents=True,exist_ok=True)
created='2026-05-24 | 23:05 (UTC+3)'
def load(p):
    p=Path(p)
    try: return json.loads(p.read_text(errors='ignore')) if p.exists() else {}
    except Exception as exc: return {'_load_error':str(exc)}
def read(p):
    p=Path(p)
    return p.read_text(errors='ignore') if p.exists() else ''
prev=load('governance/state/bem846_verify_845_and_process_or_repair.json')
status_in=prev.get('status')
missing=prev.get('missing',[])
if status_in=='triad_present_process_protocol_next':
    real=prev.get('real_responses',[])
    proto=Path('governance/protocols/BEM847_AGREED_MULTI_AGENT_PROTOCOL.md')
    proto.write_text('# BEM-847 | Agreed Multi-Agent Protocol | DRAFT FROM REAL CLAUDE RESPONSE'+sep+sep+'Дата: '+created+sep+sep+'Source response: '+str(real[-1].get('path') if real else 'unknown')+sep+sep+'Status: protocol processing started. Next step must extract decisions from the real Claude response and produce human-readable versioned protocol.'+sep)
    status='protocol_draft_created_from_real_response'
    next_action='extract decisions from real Claude response into final protocol table'
elif 'workflow_dispatch_results' in missing:
    status='dispatch_result_writer_repair_selected'
    next_action='patch dispatch result writer/commit path'
elif 'claude_runtime_state' in missing:
    q=Path('governance/workflow_dispatch_queue/bem847_claude_runtime_state_retry.json')
    q.write_text(json.dumps({'schema_version':'workflow_dispatch_queue_item.v11','workflow':'claude-internal-auditor-dispatcher.yml','workflow_id':'claude-internal-auditor-dispatcher.yml','ref':'main','inputs':{},'reason':'BEM-847 retry Claude runtime state missing','created_at':created},indent=2,ensure_ascii=False)+sep)
    status='runtime_retry_queued'
    next_action='fresh tick and verify runtime state'
elif 'real_claude_response' in missing:
    msg=Path('governance/audit_mailbox/gpt_to_claude/bem847_response_retry.md')
    msg.write_text('# BEM-847 | RESPONSE RETRY'+sep+sep+'Дата: '+created+sep+'Claude Internal Auditor: write real response with CLAUDE RESPONSE marker and Decision line to governance/audit_mailbox/claude_to_gpt/bem847_claude_response.md. No issue comments.'+sep)
    q=Path('governance/workflow_dispatch_queue/bem847_claude_response_retry.json')
    q.write_text(json.dumps({'schema_version':'workflow_dispatch_queue_item.v11','workflow':'claude-internal-auditor-dispatcher.yml','workflow_id':'claude-internal-auditor-dispatcher.yml','ref':'main','inputs':{},'reason':'BEM-847 retry real Claude response missing','created_at':created},indent=2,ensure_ascii=False)+sep)
    status='response_retry_queued'
    next_action='fresh tick and verify real response'
else:
    status='unknown_next_action'
    next_action='diagnose BEM-846 state'
state={'bem':'BEM-847','status':status,'input_status':status_in,'input_missing':missing,'next_action':next_action,'created_at':created}
Path('governance/state/bem847_execute_bem846_next.json').write_text(json.dumps(state,indent=2,ensure_ascii=False)+sep)
Path('governance/reports/bem847_execute_bem846_next.md').write_text('# BEM-847 | Execute BEM-846 Next | '+status+sep+sep+json.dumps(state,ensure_ascii=False)+sep)
Path('governance/tasks/pending/bem847_next.md').write_text('Next: '+next_action+sep+'Operator relay forbidden. Report does not stop development.'+sep)
Path('governance/handoff/GPT_NEXT_ACTION.md').write_text('# GPT NEXT ACTION | BEM-847'+sep+sep+'Status: '+status+sep+'Next: '+next_action+sep)
with Path('governance/transport/results.jsonl').open('a',encoding='utf-8') as h: h.write(json.dumps(state,ensure_ascii=False)+sep)
changed=['governance/state/bem847_execute_bem846_next.json','governance/reports/bem847_execute_bem846_next.md','governance/tasks/pending/bem847_next.md','governance/handoff/GPT_NEXT_ACTION.md','governance/transport/results.jsonl']
if status=='protocol_draft_created_from_real_response': changed.append('governance/protocols/BEM847_AGREED_MULTI_AGENT_PROTOCOL.md')
if status=='runtime_retry_queued': changed.append('governance/workflow_dispatch_queue/bem847_claude_runtime_state_retry.json')
if status=='response_retry_queued': changed.extend(['governance/audit_mailbox/gpt_to_claude/bem847_response_retry.md','governance/workflow_dispatch_queue/bem847_claude_response_retry.json'])
changed_files.extend(changed)
ops_applied.append('Executed BEM-846 next-action: process protocol if triad exists, otherwise queue runtime/response retry for the missing proof')
"""
No issue comments.
